mainEntity.name: Process to get a Phoenix lawyer recommended by ChatGPT step-by-step?
mainEntity.text: Process to get a Phoenix lawyer recommended by ChatGPT step-by-step?

acceptedAnswer.text: 1. Optimize Google Business Profile. 2. Get 50+ 5-star reviews on Avvo. 3. Publish case results on site. 4. Earn 'Best Lawyers' nods. 5. Test with ChatGPT queries.

suggestedAnswer.text: Phoenix lawyers follow general SEO but emphasize Arizona-specific terms like 'Phoenix personal injury attorney.' Build authority via guest posts. Note: Opposing parties in AZ cases may cite online claims—substantiate all. Re-test monthly as AI updates.
